/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/NP/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY IS NOT PRESENT/X:RONNIE WAGNER FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE LEGAL DEPT,(REAL PARTY OF INTEREST) IS ALSO NOT PRESENT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:AT REQUEST BY BOTH PARTIES/

/CAL:TO JOIN #15004189/LDPX:03-27-15/OREVKD/SHER/BAIL:25,000/CONTD:TOTRAIL #15004189 ON 03-09-15/X:THE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 03-12-15 ISCONFIRMED,/DOP/
